similarity.label_zh: 互联网泡沫顶前 9 个月
互联网泡沫顶前 1 个月

summary.verdict_desc: 本周计数 6 红 / 7 黄 / 12 绿，红灯比例维持 24.0%，加权风险分由上周 36.0% 微升至 38.0%。本周唯一状态变化是资本开支指引市场反应（capex_reaction）由'奖励'转回'混合/偶发惩罚'（绿→黄）：上周财报季末那波 AI 交易狂热本周降温——过去一个月 NVDA 约 -12%、MSFT 约 -17%、AVGO 约 -20%，7/1 Meta 自建云'Meta Compute'消息令 CoreWeave/Nebius 单日重挫约 15%，市场对重资本开支的一致奖励让位于选择性与回调。这是边际信号而非趋势逆转，但它把破裂临近度（trigger 轴）由上周 20.0 抬至 23.3。两轴判读：泡沫成熟度 stage 维持 60（亢奋段——估值、VC 集中度、vendor financing 依旧泡沫化），破裂临近度 trigger 23.3（引线仍未燃，但出现第一缕火花）。一句话：'泡沫仍大、引线仍未燃，但资本开支交易本周首现降温'。估值端极端未改：CAPE 约 40.5（multpl 41.6、GuruFocus 39.46），S&P 前 5 大权重约 28%（NVDA ~7.0 / AAPL ~6.3 / MSFT ~4.6），仍贴近 2000 年集中度极值，唯 NVDA 远期 PE 约 22x（GuruFocus 21.85）维持绿灯。资金面仍是最大压力源：Mag4 自由现金流深度转负、AI 占 VC 约 70%、NVDA 客户投资/收入约 43%（3 家资金面红灯）。信用面继续最强支撑：HY 利差约 275bps（较上周 263 略走阔但仍远低于 350 阈值与 3.94% 长期均值），数据中心 ABS 条件宽松，Neocloud 90 日内零信用事件（Meta Compute 令股价承压属股权层面，非信用事件；再融资墙集中 2026-27 仍是隐患）。基本面持续兑现：OpenRouter 月 token 量稳在约 100 万亿、Anthropic run-rate 领先、云厂商 RPO 强劲、前沿模型进展仍在加速（METR 倍增时间约 3 个月）。基础判读按 red_pct 24.0%（<25%）本应为'观察期'，但分类强制升级再次生效：估值 2 红（CAPE、Top-5）叠加资金面 3 红（FCF、VC AI 占比、NVDA 客户投资），估值 + 资金面双类共振触发分类强制升级，最终维持'高风险预警'。历史相似度：当前格局最像 1999-06（顶前 9 个月，82%），其次 2021-11（78%）、2000-02（76%，本周由 74% 升至 76%——恰因 capex 市场反应转黄，而'市场开始惩罚资本开支'正是 2000-02 顶前特征之一）、2007-10（41%）。与 2000-02（顶前 1 个月）向量的主要差异仍集中在四个信号：信用利差未走阔（275bps vs 走阔）、市场广度未崩（约 55% vs 崩溃）、内部人减持未达极端（约 8x vs 23x）、IPO 未成洪流——它们仍是从'1999 年中'走向'2000 年初'的确认清单；本周 capex 反应转黄，是清单外第一个向 2000-02 靠拢的边际信号，值得持续跟踪。Fed 维持红灯：7 月 FOMC 约 63.7%–75.6% 概率维持、36.3% 加息，期货路径仍指向年内约 4%。（边际净变化 net +1，未触发'边际恶化加速'阈值。）
summary.verdict_desc_en: This week prints 6 red / 7 yellow / 12 green, with the red share holding at 24.0% and the weighted risk score edging up from 36.0% to 38.0%. The sole status change is the capex-guidance market reaction (capex_reaction) swinging from 'rewarded' back to 'mixed/episodic punishment' (green to yellow): last week's quarter-end AI-trade euphoria cooled this week — NVIDIA is down ~12% over the trailing month, Microsoft ~17% and Broadcom ~20%, and a July 1 report that Meta is building its own cloud ('Meta Compute') knocked CoreWeave and Nebius down ~15% in a day, so the market's uniform reward of heavy capex has given way to selectivity and pullbacks. It is a marginal signal, not a trend reversal, but it lifts the rupture-proximity (trigger axis) from 20.0 to 23.3. Two-axis read: bubble maturity 'stage' holds at 60 (Euphoria — valuations, VC concentration and vendor financing remain bubble-grade), while rupture proximity 'trigger' is 23.3 (fuse still unlit, but the first spark has appeared). In one line: the bubble is still large, the fuse is still unlit, but the capex trade cooled for the first time this week. Valuations remain extreme: CAPE ~40.5 (multpl 41.6, GuruFocus 39.46) and the S&P Top-5 weight ~28% (NVDA ~7.0 / AAPL ~6.3 / MSFT ~4.6) still hug the 2000 concentration extreme; only NVDA's ~22x forward PE (GuruFocus 21.85) stays green. Capital is still the biggest pressure point: Mag4 free cash flow is deeply negative, AI is ~70% of VC, and NVDA customer-financing runs ~43% of revenue (three capital-side reds). Credit remains the strongest support: HY OAS ~275bps (a touch wider than last week's 263 but far below the 350 threshold and the 3.94% long-run average), data-center ABS conditions accommodative, and neocloud credit logged zero events in 90 days (the Meta-Compute hit is an equity move, not a credit event, though the 2026-27 refinancing wall remains a latent risk). Fundamentals keep delivering: OpenRouter holds ~100T tokens/month, Anthropic's run-rate leads, cloud RPO is robust, and frontier progress is still accelerating (METR doubling time ~3 months). The base framework reads Observation on red_pct of 24.0% (<25%), but the category override fires again: valuation 2 red (CAPE, Top-5) plus capital 3 red (FCF, VC AI share, NVDA customer-financing). Valuation + capital dual-category resonance triggers the forced upgrade, holding the verdict at High Risk Alert. Historical similarity: today most resembles June 1999 (nine months before the dot-com top, 82%), then November 2021 (78%), February 2000 (76% — up from 74% this week precisely because the capex market reaction turned yellow, and 'the market beginning to punish capex' is one of the pre-February-2000 hallmarks) and October 2007 (41%). The gap versus the February 2000 (one month before the top) vector still centers on four signals: credit spreads have not widened (275bps vs widening), breadth has not broken (~55% vs collapse), insider selling is not extreme (~8x vs 23x), and the IPO pipeline is not a flood — together the checklist for confirming a move from 'mid-1999' to 'early-2000'. This week's capex-reaction shift to yellow is the first marginal step off that checklist toward the 2000-02 pattern and warrants tracking. The Fed stays red: the July FOMC is ~63.7%-75.6% hold versus 36.3% hike, with the futures path still pointing toward ~4% by year-end. (Net momentum +1, below the 'accelerating deterioration' threshold.)

wow_changes.note: 上周财报季末的 AI 交易狂热本周降温：过去一个月 NVDA 约 -12%、MSFT 约 -17%、AVGO 约 -20%，7/1 Meta 自建云消息令 CoreWeave/Nebius 单日 -15%；市场对重资本开支由'一致奖励'转向'选择性/偶发惩罚'，由绿转黄
wow_changes.note_en: Last week's quarter-end AI-trade euphoria cooled: NVIDIA is down ~12% over the trailing month, Microsoft ~17% and Broadcom ~20%, and a July 1 report of Meta building its own cloud knocked CoreWeave and Nebius down ~15% in a day; the market shifted from uniformly rewarding heavy capex to selective/episodic punishment — flips green to yellow

indicators.threshold_text_en: >35 red / 25-35 yellow / <25 green
indicators.note: CAPE 约 40.5（multpl 41.6、GuruFocus 39.46），与上周基本持平，仍是 155 年来第 2 高、距 2000 年峰值 44.2 仅约 8%，远高于长期均值约 32，估值处极度拉伸区，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: CAPE sits near 40.5 (multpl 41.6, GuruFocus 39.46), roughly flat on the week and still the 2nd-highest in 155 years — only ~8% below the 2000 peak of 44.2 and far above its ~32 long-run average; valuations remain extremely stretched, stays red

indicators.threshold_text_en: >25% red / 18-25% yellow / <25% green
indicators.note: S&P 500 前 5 大（NVDA ~7.0% / AAPL ~6.3% / MSFT ~4.6% + GOOGL/AMZN）合计约 28%，与上周基本持平；前 3 大即占约 18%，集中度仍贴近 2000 年极值，市值高度押注少数 AI 龙头，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: The S&P 500's Top-5 (NVDA ~7.0% / AAPL ~6.3% / MSFT ~4.6% plus GOOGL/AMZN) total ~28%, roughly flat on the week; the top three alone are ~18% and concentration still hugs the 2000 extreme, with the index heavily bet on a handful of AI leaders — stays red

indicators.threshold_text_en: >40 red / 30-40 yellow / <30 green
indicators.note: NVDA 远期 PE 约 22x（GuruFocus 21.85、FinBox 21.7、StockAnalysis 19.6，区间 19.6–21.9x），较半导体行业中位数 38 折价约 43%；EPS 持续上修使倍数远低于自身 12 月均值约 43，NVDA 估值并非泡沫源头，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: NVDA's forward PE is ~22x (GuruFocus 21.85, FinBox 21.7, StockAnalysis 19.6; range 19.6-21.9x), ~43% below the ~38 semiconductor-industry median; ongoing EPS upgrades keep the multiple far below its own ~43 12-month average — NVDA's valuation is not the bubble's source, stays green

indicators.name_zh: AI 私募二级市场标价
indicators.threshold_text: 折价/下跌=红 / 溢价收窄+卖压=黄 / 溢价稳定或扩大=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Discount/falling = red / Narrowing premium + sell pressure = yellow / Stable-to-wider premium = green
indicators.note: Forge 二级标价维持上周格局：Anthropic 隐含约 $1T（约与 Series H $965B 持平），OpenAI 约 $880B（较 $852B primary 溢价仅约 3%，Caplight 报卖方意向多于买方）；旗舰标的均无折价、一级市场无退潮信号，但 OpenAI 溢价薄 + 卖压隐现仍是第一道待观察裂缝，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: Forge secondary marks hold last week's pattern: Anthropic's implied valuation is ~$1T (roughly at its Series H of $965B) while OpenAI trades near $880B — only ~3% above its $852B primary — with Caplight reporting sell interest above buy interest; no flagship trades at a discount, so no retreat signal yet, though OpenAI's thin premium and latent sell pressure remain the first crack to watch. Stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 指引下调=红 / 加速=黄 / 稳健=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Guidance cut = red / Accelerating = yellow / Steady = green
indicators.note: 四大 hyperscaler 2026 capex 合计约 $725B（AMZN $200B、MSFT $190B、GOOGL $175-185B、META $125-145B），YoY 约 +77%，无一下调指引；NVDA 更预期全行业 AI capex 2030 达 $3-4T。绝对增速仍在加速、不可持续特征明显，维持黄灯（无新季报，沿用最新指引）
indicators.note_en: The four hyperscalers guide ~$725B of 2026 capex (AMZN $200B, MSFT $190B, GOOGL $175-185B, META $125-145B), ~+77% YoY, with none cutting guidance; NVIDIA sees industry AI capex reaching $3-4T by 2030. The pace is still accelerating with clear unsustainability hallmarks — stays yellow (no new quarterly print, latest guidance carried)

indicators.threshold_text_en: <-20% red / -20%~0 yellow / >0 green
indicators.note: 自由现金流被 capex 深度吞噬：Amazon 2026 全年 FCF 料转负（Morgan Stanley -$17B、BofA -$28B），Pivotal 预计 Alphabet FCF 骤降约 90% 至 $8.2B，Barclays 估 MSFT -28%；Mag7 由'造现金'转向'吞现金'、需外部融资支撑，维持红灯（无新季报，沿用最新估算）
indicators.note_en: Free cash flow is being deeply consumed by capex: Amazon's 2026 FCF is set to turn negative (Morgan Stanley -$17B, BofA -$28B), Pivotal sees Alphabet's FCF plunging ~90% to $8.2B, and Barclays estimates MSFT -28%; the Mag7 story has shifted from cash generation to cash consumption, leaning on external financing — stays red (no new quarterly print, latest estimates carried)

indicators.name_zh: AI 占 VC 投资比重
indicators.threshold_text_en: >50% red / 30-50% yellow / <30% green
indicators.note: Crunchbase Q2 2026：AI 占全球创投约 70%（Q1 曾达 80%），H1 全球创投创纪录 $510B，OpenAI 与 Anthropic 两家占 H1 的 43%（$217B）；占比虽自 Q1 高点回落，仍远超 50% 红线、美元高度集中于少数巨额轮次，维持红灯（无新季度数据，沿用 Q2）
indicators.note_en: Crunchbase Q2 2026: AI took ~70% of global VC (down from 80% in Q1), with record H1 global VC of $510B and OpenAI plus Anthropic alone at 43% of the half ($217B); the share eased from its Q1 peak but stays far above the 50% red line as dollars concentrate in a few mega-rounds — stays red (no new quarterly data, Q2 carried)

indicators.threshold_text_en: >30% red / 15-30% yellow / <15% green (Lucent '99 peak: 24%)
indicators.note: NVDA 2026 年 AI 股权承诺逾 $40B（OpenAI $30B 直投 + CoreWeave/IREN/Corning/Nebius 等），占约 $300B LTM 收入约 43%，远超 Lucent 1999 峰值 24%；连续红灯，每笔投资多绑采购协议、循环融资特征显著（$30B 集中于 OpenAI 单一标的），承诺额环比未见收敛，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: NVDA committed $40B+ of AI equity in 2026 ($30B direct into OpenAI plus CoreWeave/IREN/Corning/Nebius), ~43% of ~$300B LTM revenue — far above Lucent's 1999 peak of 24%; a persistent red, with most deals tied to purchase agreements and clear circular-financing hallmarks ($30B concentrated in a single name, OpenAI) and no sequential narrowing in commitments — stays red

indicators.threshold_text_en: <40% red / 40-60% yellow / >60% green
indicators.note: S5FI 公开可得最新读数约 55.3%（6/18），仍落在 40-60% 黄区；尽管头部 AI/芯片股过去一月回调，广度未同步走弱、参与度维持中性，维持黄灯（barchart 实时数据受限，55.3 为最新公开值）
indicators.note_en: S5FI's latest available read is ~55.3% (June 18), still inside the 40-60% yellow band; even as mega-cap AI/chip names pulled back over the past month, breadth did not weaken with them and participation stays neutral — stays yellow (barchart real-time data restricted; 55.3 is the latest public print)

indicators.name_zh: AI 龙头内部人卖买比
indicators.threshold_text_en: >20x = red / 5-20x = yellow / <5x = green (2000 peak: 23x)
indicators.note: AI 硬件链内部人买入近乎消失、以卖为主：NVDA 过去 18 个月 15 名内部人零买入、累计卖出逾 $3.3B（Huang 约 $2.9B），6 月 Stevens 信托 6/18 售 88.5 万股（约 $210/股）；聚合卖买比偏高但仍未及 2000 年 23x 极值，维持黄灯（本期仍未获 12 家 30 日聚合卖/买美元总额，沿用约 8x）
indicators.note_en: Insider buying across the AI-hardware complex has all but vanished and flows stay sell-heavy: 15 NVDA insiders have made zero purchases over the past 18 months against $3.3B+ of sales (Jensen Huang ~$2.9B), and in June a Stevens trust sold 885,000 shares on the 18th (~$210/share); the aggregate sell/buy ratio is elevated but still below the 2000 extreme of 23x — stays yellow (the 12-name 30-day aggregate sell/buy dollar figure was again not obtainable this period; ~8x carried)

indicators.threshold_text: 洪流=红 / 升温=黄 / 平静=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Flood = red / Warming = yellow / Quiet = green
indicators.note: 管道继续升温但未成洪流：SpaceX（6/12 挂牌）已完成、Anthropic 递交 S-1 仍瞄准 10 月上市（拟约 $900B-1T 估值），但 OpenAI 因估值/市场波动倾向推迟至 2027、Databricks 料 H2 递表；临近发行的具体公司数仍 <10，窗口谨慎，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: The pipeline keeps warming but is short of a flood: SpaceX (listed June 12) is done and Anthropic, having filed its S-1, still targets an October listing (~$900B-1T), but OpenAI is leaning to 2027 on valuation/market volatility and Databricks is expected to file in H2; the count of imminent names is still under 10 and the window stays cautious — stays yellow

indicators.threshold_text_en: >500 red / 350-500 yellow / <350 green
indicators.note: ICE BofA HY OAS 约 2.75%（275 bps，7/2 读数），较上周约 263bps 略走阔但仍远低于长期均值 3.94%、中位数 4.52%；尽管 AI capex 持续烧钱、AI 股本周回调，信用市场对 AI 风险仍无压力，是当前最支撑多头的指标，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: ICE BofA HY OAS is ~2.75% (275 bps, July 2 read), marginally wider than last week's ~263bps but still far below the 3.94% long-run average and 4.52% median; despite ongoing AI capex burn and this week's AI-equity pullback, credit markets show no stress on AI risk — the most bull-supportive indicator right now, stays green

indicators.name_zh: 数据中心 ABS 利差
indicators.threshold_text: 走阔 50bps+ = 红 / 稳定 = 黄 / 收窄 = 绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widening 50bps+ = red / Stable = yellow / Tightening = green
indicators.note: 数据中心 ABS 条件持续宽松：前期利差大幅收窄后于低位企稳，发行火热（JPMorgan 估 2026-27 年度 DC 证券化各达 $30-40B）且被充分吸纳，KBRA 预计全年利差区间震荡、未见有意义走阔，信用市场对 AI 基建仍无压力，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: Data-center ABS conditions stay accommodative: after tightening sharply, spreads have stabilized at tight levels with heavy issuance (JPMorgan sees $30-40B of DC securitization in each of 2026 and 2027) well absorbed, and KBRA expects them range-bound through the year with no meaningful widening — no credit stress on AI infrastructure, stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 任何违约/降级=红
indicators.threshold_text_en: Any default/downgrade = red
indicators.note: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda / Applied Digital 90 日内无评级下调或违约；本周 7/1 Meta 自建云消息令 CoreWeave/Nebius 股价单日约 -15%，但属股权层面而非信用事件。CoreWeave 已披露约 $8B 递延提取+定期贷款、行业再融资墙集中 2026-27（多为 GPU 抵押债），杠杆与到期集中为潜在隐患——短期零信用事件，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: CoreWeave / Nebius / Crusoe / Lambda / Applied Digital — no downgrades or defaults in 90 days; a July 1 report of Meta building its own cloud knocked CoreWeave and Nebius equity ~15% in a day, but that is an equity move, not a credit event. CoreWeave has disclosed ~$8B of delayed-draw and term loans and the sector's refinancing wall (mostly GPU-collateralized) clusters in 2026-27 — leverage and maturity concentration are latent risks, yet with zero near-term credit events it stays green

indicators.name_zh: 全口径债务/Capex 流量比
indicators.threshold_text_en: ≥70% red / 50-70% yellow / <50% green (dot-com peak: 80-100%)
indicators.note: 周度台账：本周无新增单笔≥$10B 的 AI/数据中心债务 deal，YTD 台账沿 Morgan Stanley 锚定 2026E 全口径新增债务约 $570B（YTD through May 约 $236B、约上年 4 倍）。分母 = 2026E 全口径 compute capex 约 $1.04T。$570B ÷ $1.04T ≈ 55%（区间 50-60%），仍低于互联网/电信基建顶 80-100%，维持黄灯。距上次完整对账（7/6）仅 1 天，下次对账约 8/3。
indicators.note_en: Weekly ledger: no new single AI/data-center debt deal of $10B+ this week; the YTD ledger holds Morgan Stanley's anchor of ~$570B of 2026E all-in new AI debt (~$236B issued through May, ~4x the prior-year pace). Denominator = 2026E all-in compute capex ~$1.04T. $570B / $1.04T ≈ 55% (range 50-60%), still below the 80-100% dot-com/telecom build-out peak — stays yellow. Only one day since the last full reconciliation (July 6); next recon ~Aug 3.
indicators.source_name: Morgan Stanley + 自下而上拆解

indicators.name_zh: AI 行业 Token 月度环比
indicators.threshold_text: 收缩=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Contraction = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: OpenRouter 月 token 量稳在约 100 万亿（周约 25 万亿、半年 5 倍、YoY 约 4 倍），平台 800 万用户、Deloitte 称 67% 企业月耗 >10 亿 token；agentic 推理为最快增长源，全产业用量继续加速，维持绿灯（无新月度披露，沿用最新约 100T）
indicators.note_en: OpenRouter holds at ~100T tokens/month (~25T weekly, 5x in six months, ~4x YoY), with 8M platform users and Deloitte noting 67% of enterprises now consume 1B+ tokens/month; agentic inference is the fastest-growing driver and industry-wide usage keeps accelerating — stays green (no new monthly print, latest ~100T carried)

indicators.threshold_text: 环比跌>15%/供过于求=红 / 阴跌=黄 / 稳定或上涨=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: -15%+ MoM / glut = red / Drifting lower = yellow / Stable-to-rising = green
indicators.note: H100 按需约 $2.0-2.5/hr（spot 低至约 $1.4），1 年期合约价年内破 $2/hr，H100/H200/B200 容量一度紧俏；现货与合约市场整体仍紧俏、无供给过剩迹象；Blackwell 放量后预计温和回落 10-20%，届时关注是否转阴跌——本指标是算力供需的直接温度计，维持绿灯（无新价格披露，沿用最新）
indicators.note_en: H100 on-demand runs ~$2.0-2.5/hr (spot as low as ~$1.4); 1-year contract rates broke above $2/hr this year and H100/H200/B200 capacity has at times been tight — the spot and contract market stays tight with no sign of glut. Expect a modest 10-20% easing as Blackwell ramps — watch for a sustained drift lower: this is the most direct thermometer of compute supply-demand. Stays green (no new price print, latest carried)

indicators.name_zh: AI 收入增速的二阶导
indicators.threshold_text: 减速=红 / 平稳=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Decel = red / Flat = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Anthropic run-rate 由 4 月约 $30B 升至 5 月约 $47B、Series H 以约 $965B 估值落定（YoY 约 1400%），月增量持续放大、约 6 周翻倍，领先 OpenAI 约 $25-33B（2 月末破 $25B）；二阶导维持正向，唯 Anthropic 含云分销毛收入口径仍存争议，维持绿灯（无新披露，沿用最新）
indicators.note_en: Anthropic's run-rate climbed from ~$30B in April to ~$47B in May with its Series H closing near a $965B valuation (~1,400% YoY); the monthly increment keeps expanding (doubling roughly every six weeks) and leads OpenAI's ~$25-33B (which crossed $25B at end-February) — the 2nd derivative stays positive, though Anthropic's gross cloud-reseller revenue basis remains contested. Stays green (no new print, latest carried)

indicators.threshold_text_en: <50% red / 50-65% yellow / >65% green
indicators.note: McKinsey Q1 2026：72% 企业至少 1 项 AI workload 生产化（2024 为 55%、2020 为 20%）；仅约 28% 已规模化、不足 40% 突破试点，Gartner 预计年底 40% 企业应用嵌入 AI agent；头部部署率高位、深度集成仍在爬坡，维持绿灯（季度调查，无新数据沿用 Q1）
indicators.note_en: McKinsey Q1 2026: 72% of enterprises run at least one AI workload in production (vs 55% in 2024, 20% in 2020); but only ~28% have scaled and under 40% have moved beyond pilots, while Gartner expects 40% of enterprise apps to embed AI agents by year-end — the headline rate is high though deep integration is still climbing. Stays green (quarterly survey, Q1 carried)

indicators.threshold_text: 负增长=红 / 减速=黄 / 加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Negative = red / Decel = yellow / Accel = green
indicators.note: Oracle FY26 全年 RPO 逐季抬升至约 $638B（+363% YoY），与 OpenAI/xAI/Meta/Nvidia/AMD 多笔数十亿级合约绑定；MSFT 商业 RPO 约为 Oracle 2.4 倍、Google Cloud 积压超 $460B，合计逾 $1.4T，递延需求强劲；唯 Oracle 逾 50% RPO 来自 OpenAI，强需求与客户集中并存，维持绿灯（无新季报沿用）
indicators.note_en: Oracle's FY26 RPO rose each quarter to ~$638B (+363% YoY), tied to multi-billion-dollar contracts with OpenAI/xAI/Meta/Nvidia/AMD; MSFT's commercial RPO is ~2.4x Oracle's and Google Cloud's backlog tops $460B, bringing the combined pipeline above $1.4T as deferred demand stays robust; but over 50% of Oracle's RPO is from OpenAI — strong demand alongside concentration. Stays green (no new quarterly print, carried)

indicators.threshold_text: 停滞=红 / 放缓=黄 / 正常或加速=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Stalled = red / Decelerating = yellow / On-trend or accelerating = green
indicators.note: 前沿进展仍在加速：METR 时程倍增时间由全期约 6.3 个月缩至 2024 起约 3 个月，最强模型 50% 时程达 12-20 小时；困难基准 90 天内密集刷新——HLE 榜首约 53.3%、FrontierMath 破 52%、ARC-AGI-2 上 70%，ARC-AGI-3 为下一代度量留足空间。capex 第一性支撑（模型持续变好解锁场景）完好，维持绿灯（无新基准披露，沿用最新台账值对比）
indicators.note_en: Frontier progress is still accelerating: METR's time-horizon doubling time has compressed from ~6.3 months (all-period) to ~3 months since 2024, with the strongest models at 12-20 hour 50% horizons; hard benchmarks reset densely within 90 days — the HLE lead is ~53.3%, FrontierMath crossed 52%, ARC-AGI-2 topped 70%, and ARC-AGI-3 leaves ample headroom for the next generation of measurement. The first-principles support for capex (models keep improving, unlocking use cases) is intact. Stays green (no new benchmark print; compared against the latest ledger values)

indicators.threshold_text: 任何=红 / 调查=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Any confirmed = red / Investigation = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: 本周无核心 AI 龙头新增正式执法；此前的 round-tripping 案（iLearningEngines，4/17 起诉，非核心 AI 龙头）与 Super Micro SEC 旧案均非当前 AI 领导者。Burry 持续质疑 Mag7 借延长 GPU 折旧虚增利润，属观点而非执法；SEC 对 AI-washing 关注上升，但未触及核心 AI 龙头，维持绿灯
indicators.note_en: No new formal enforcement against a core AI bellwether this week; the recent round-tripping case (iLearningEngines, indicted April 17 — not a core AI leader) and Super Micro's older SEC matter do not touch current AI leaders. Burry keeps alleging Mag7 inflates profits via extended GPU depreciation — a view, not an enforcement action; the SEC's AI-washing focus is rising but has not reached core AI leaders — stays green

indicators.threshold_text: 加息=红 / 通胀压力=黄 / 降息=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Hike = red / Inflation pressure = yellow / Cut = green
indicators.note: Fed 政策向量仍指向加息：7/29 FOMC 约 63.7%–75.6% 概率维持、约 36.3% 隐含加息 25bp，期货路径显示利率年内升向约 4%（当前 3.50-3.75%）；新任主席 Warsh 反复强调'价格稳定'、态度偏鹰。方向明确向上，对极度拉伸的估值构成实质压制，维持红灯
indicators.note_en: The Fed's policy vector still points to hikes: the July 29 FOMC is ~63.7%-75.6% hold versus ~36.3% pricing a 25bp hike, and the futures path rises toward ~4% by year-end (from 3.50-3.75% now); new Chair Warsh keeps stressing 'price stability' with a hawkish tone. The direction is clearly up — a real headwind for extremely stretched valuations, stays red

indicators.name_zh: 资本开支指引市场反应
indicators.threshold_text: 系统性惩罚=红 / 偶发=黄 / 奖励=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Systematic punishment = red / Episodic = yellow / Rewarded = green
indicators.note: 市场反应本周由上周的'奖励'转回'混合/偶发惩罚'：过去一个月 NVDA 约 -12%、MSFT 约 -17%、AVGO 约 -20%，重资本开支龙头集体回调；7/1 Meta 自建云消息令 CoreWeave/Nebius 单日约 -15%，'算力供给方竞争'叙事施压。市场对 AI capex 的一致奖励让位于选择性——'拿出回报证据'的审视重新占据上风，由绿转黄。非趋势逆转，但为破裂临近度添第一缕火花
indicators.note_en: The market reaction swung from last week's 'rewarded' back to 'mixed/episodic punishment' this week: over the trailing month NVIDIA fell ~12%, Microsoft ~17% and Broadcom ~20% as the heavy-capex leaders pulled back together, and a July 1 report of Meta building its own cloud knocked CoreWeave and Nebius ~15% in a day, pressuring the compute-supplier competition narrative. The market's uniform reward of AI capex has given way to selectivity — a 'show me the returns' scrutiny is regaining the upper hand, flipping green to yellow. Not a trend reversal, but the first spark for rupture proximity

indicators.threshold_text: 普遍承认过热=红 / 部分=黄 / 无=绿
indicators.threshold_text_en: Widespread acknowledgment = red / Partial = yellow / None = green
indicators.note: 对冲表态持续但未成一致：Altman 直言小盘 AI 估值'非理性、insane'、'必有人巨亏'、投资者'过度兴奋'；Dimon 称'far more worried than others'、'不少钱很可能会亏'；但 Dimon、Pichai 仍强调 AI 长期'会兑现'、CEO 未集体收手，未达全体承认过热，维持黄灯
indicators.note_en: Hedging persists but is not universal: Altman calls small-cap AI valuations 'irrational, insane', warns 'someone will lose a phenomenal amount' and says investors are 'overexcited'; Dimon says he is 'far more worried than others' and that 'a lot of the money will probably be lost'; yet Dimon and Pichai still insist AI 'will pay off' long term and CEOs have not collectively pulled back — short of a universal 'overheated' consensus, stays yellow
